glosses.en: to make an effort; to try hard
glosses.ja: 努力する; 負担をかける

translations.fr: Je veux faire de mon mieux.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn cố gắng hết mình.

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular personal pronoun, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite modal auxiliary, present tense, 1st person singular; selects a bare infinitive.
Reflexive personal pronoun, 1st person singular, accusative; coreferential with the subject.
Lexical verb in infinitive; separable-prefix verb (an- + strengen), used reflexively with 'sich'; infinitival complement of the modal.

sentences.target: Er muss sich für die Prüfung anstrengen.
sentences.reading: /eːɐ̯ mʊs zɪç fyːɐ̯ diː ˈpʁyːfʊŋ ˈanʃtʁɛŋən/

translations.de: Er muss sich für die Prüfung anstrengen.
translations.ipa: /eːɐ̯ mʊs zɪç fyːɐ̯ diː ˈpʁyːfʊŋ ˈanʃtʁɛŋən/
translations.en: He has to work hard for the exam.
translations.es: Tiene que estudiar mucho para el examen.
translations.fr: Il doit beaucoup travailler pour l'examen.
translations.ru: Ему нужно усердно готовиться к экзамену.
translations.pt: Ele precisa estudar muito para a prova.
translations.vi: Anh ấy phải học chăm chỉ cho kỳ thi.
translations.ar: عليه أن يدرس بجد من أجل الامتحان.
translations.nl: Hij moet hard studeren voor het examen.
translations.uk: Йому треба наполегливо готуватися до іспиту.
translations.hi: उसे परीक्षा के लिए खूब पढ़ाई करनी है.
translations.pl: Musi ciężko się uczyć do egzaminu.
translations.el: Πρέπει να διαβάσει σκληρά για την εξέταση.
translations.nb: Han må lese mye til eksamen.
translations.id: Dia harus belajar keras untuk ujian.
translations.sv: Han måste plugga hårt inför provet.
translations.ro: Trebuie să învețe mult pentru examen.
translations.cs: Musí se hodně učit na zkoušku.
translations.da: Han skal læse meget til eksamen.
translations.ja: 彼は試験のために一生懸命勉強しなければなりません。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person singular personal pronoun, nominative; subject.
Finite modal auxiliary, present tense, 3rd person singular; selects a bare infinitive.
Reflexive pronoun, 3rd person, accusative; coreferential with the subject.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces a purpose/beneficiary prepositional phrase.
Definite article, feminine singular accusative (agreeing with 'Prüfung').
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition 'für'.
Lexical verb in infinitive; separable-prefix verb, used reflexively with 'sich'; verbal complement of the modal.

sentences.target: Wir sollten uns im Training mehr anstrengen.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈzɔltən ʊns ɪm ˈtʁeːnɪŋ meːɐ̯ ˈanʃtʁɛŋən/

translations.de: Wir sollten uns im Training mehr anstrengen.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈzɔltən ʊns ɪm ˈtʁeːnɪŋ meːɐ̯ ˈanʃtʁɛŋən/
translations.en: We should try harder in practice.
translations.es: Deberíamos esforzarnos más en el entrenamiento.
translations.it: Dovremmo impegnarci di più in allenamento.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在训练时应该更努力。
translations.yue: 我哋喺訓練時應該更努力。
translations.pt: Devemos nos esforçar mais no treino.
translations.vi: Chúng ta nên cố gắng hơn trong lúc tập luyện.
translations.ar: ينبغي أن نبذل جهدًا أكبر في التدريب.
translations.nl: We zouden tijdens de training harder moeten trainen.
translations.uk: Нам слід більше старатися на тренуваннях.
translations.hi: हमें अभ्यास में और मेहनत करनी चाहिए.
translations.pl: Powinniśmy bardziej się starać na treningu.
translations.el: Πρέπει να προσπαθήσουμε περισσότερο στην προπόνηση.
translations.nb: Vi bør legge inn mer innsats på trening.
translations.id: Kita sebaiknya berusaha lebih keras saat latihan.
translations.sv: Vi borde anstränga oss mer på träningen.
translations.ro: Ar trebui să ne străduim mai mult la antrenament.
translations.cs: Měli bychom se na tréninku víc snažit.
translations.da: Vi bør lægge mere indsats i træningen.
translations.ja: 練習でもっと頑張るべिकです。

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural personal pronoun, nominative; subject.
Finite modal auxiliary, preterite/irrealis, 1st person plural; deontic suggestion; selects a bare infinitive.
Reflexive personal pronoun, 1st person plural, accusative; coreferential with the subject.
Contraction of 'in dem' (ADP+DET); introduces a locative prepositional phrase.
Common noun, neuter; object within the PP headed by 'im'.
Degree adverb modifying the verb phrase; indicates greater extent/effort.
Lexical verb in infinitive; separable-prefix verb, used reflexively with 'uns'; complement of the modal.

translations.en: You can make an effort tomorrow.
translations.fr: Tu peux faire un effort demain.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể cố gắng ngày mai.
translations.nl: Je kunt morgen je best doen.
translations.hi: तुम कल मेहनत कर सकते हो.
translations.nb: Du kan gjøre en innsats i morgen.
translations.da: Du kan gøre en indsats i morgen.
translations.ja: 明日頑張ってもいいです。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular personal pronoun, nominative; subject.
Finite modal auxiliary, present tense, 2nd person singular; selects a bare infinitive.
Reflexive personal pronoun, 2nd person singular, accusative; coreferential with the subject.
Temporal adverb; modifies the predicate.
Lexical verb in infinitive; separable-prefix verb, used reflexively with 'dich'; complement of the modal.

en: He has to work hard for the exam.
We should try harder in practice.
You can make an effort tomorrow.
